title: Saraburi Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Saraburi with a Z-Score of +3.71. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Saraburi has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperature is causing a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 12.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 73% and the wind speed is 15.6 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
